releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This patch fixes a typo in release `0.3.1`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This patch updates the README to announce public availability Obsidian Song Links and adds a one time notification prompting users to reconnect Spotify in settings.

Additionally, it updates local storage keys and the callback URI to be consistent with plugin name.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-song-links/compare/0.3.0...0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: **Obsidian Spotify Links** is now **Obsidian Song Links** due to requirement by Spotify's Brand Guidelines. The name is updated everywhere except for places it would break something. Additionally, song links include an "on Spotify" attribution to comply with  Spotify's Brand Guidelines.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This patch updates time sensitive README notes to be more specific and look better.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This patch adds time sensitive notes to the `README` to let users know that we are waiting on a Quota Extension from Spotify. 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/compare/0.2.0...0.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* added css to fix your rectangular problems by @kamyarscode in https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/pull/7
* Open settings when plugin is used without first being logged in by @Cutaiar in https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/pull/6
* Fix two bugs relating to the profile section by @Cutaiar in https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/pull/8
* Address `obsidian-releases` PR Feedback by @Cutaiar in https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/pull/9
* Auth navigation, error handling, and electron types by @Cutaiar in https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/pull/10

## Additional Info
* Users with non-square profile pictures are no longer warped in settings
* Users without a profile picture fallback to the Spotify user icon
* All around improved error handling and messaging
* All currently known bugs are fixed

## New Contributors
* @kamyarscode made their first contribution in https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cutaiar/obsidian-spotify-links/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: The very first release of Spotify Links for Obsidian.
